format.description: Archive format. Only `tar` is implemented today; `zip` is reserved for a future release and currently surfaces BND0005.

bundle_path.description: Filesystem path the bundle was written to.

entries.description: Number of file entries written, including the manifest.

uncompressed_bytes.description: Sum of payload bytes across every entry, excluding tar headers and padding.

bundle_bytes.description: Total size of the on-disk archive in bytes.

checksum.description: FNV-1a 64-bit checksum of the archive bytes rendered as lowercase hex (16 chars).
